testcase.name: test_health_endpoint

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iteration139_grounds_dedup.py:36: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auto_identify_twice_no_duplicates

failure.message: AssertionError: DEDUP FAILED! Grounds multiplied from 6 to 7 assert 7 == 6

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration139_grounds_dedup.py:144: in test_auto_identify_twice_no_duplicates assert count_after_second == count_after_first, \ E AssertionError: DEDUP FAILED! Grounds multiplied from 6 to 7 E assert 7 == 6
